name: dotdotgod-workspace
description: Workspace for dotdotgod project memory packages across CLI, Pi, Claude Code, and Codex adapters.

scripts.verify: pnpm run verify:generated && pnpm run verify:contract && pnpm -r --if-present run verify
scripts.verify:cache: node packages/cli/bin/dotdotgod.mjs validate . --include-local-memory && node packages/cli/bin/dotdotgod.mjs index . --json && node packages/cli/bin/dotdotgod.mjs status . --json
scripts.pack:dry-run: pnpm run verify:generated && pnpm run pack:dry-run:packages
scripts.publish:all: pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/cli publish --access public && pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/pi publish --access public && pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/claude-code publish --access public && pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/codex publish --access public
